Vignette Audit

Store 419 · A26

1Select a vignette

Reference
No reference image on file
Your showroom photo
Take or upload a photo below

2Photograph the floor display

Frame the whole vignette — sofa, tables, rug, and wall art — in good light. One clear photo works best.

3Run the audit

This tool uses AI to compare your photo against the checklist. It's an assist, not a substitute for a trained eye — it's reliable on broad presence (sofa, rug, tables, count of framed art) and weak on telling near-identical SKUs apart. Always confirm flagged items yourself.
